identity: normalized skeleton (dev_7-3, literals masked) + n_variables; PLUS explicit meta.base_eq_id links (variable-index-insensitive). SCOPE: benchmark suites only -- v23-val / lample-charton-v23 (generative skeleton specs, not expression catalogs) are deliberately excluded.
known_limit: skeleton identity is variable-index-sensitive (canonicalization of variable order is a deferred decision); explicit links cover variant catalogs, and every rendering joins the union holdout independently
